# Gaussian Processes {#sec-ch-gp}

## Motivation

*[Opening question or real-world problem that motivates this chapter.
1-2 sentences placeholder.]*

## SECTION_1_TITLE

*[Content placeholder.]*

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Derivation: DERIVATION_TITLE

*[Full derivation placeholder — collapsible for advanced readers.]*
:::

::: {.panel-tabset}
## R

```r
# R code placeholder
```

## Python

```python
# Python code placeholder
```

:::

## SECTION_2_TITLE

*[Content placeholder.]*

## Summary

*[Key takeaways from this chapter — 3-5 bullet points placeholder.]*

## Exercises

1. *[Exercise placeholder.]*
